name: x-publish
description: Publish tweets and threads to X (Twitter) draft using browser automation. Use when user wants to publish content to X, save to drafts, or mentions "publish to X", "post tweet", "x-publish", "发布推文". Supports short tweets and threads. NEVER auto-publish, always saves to draft.
capabilities: Navigate to X compose page using Playwright browser automation
Copy prepared content to system clipboard for cross-platform paste operations
Parse thread content and save each tweet to a draft thread on X
Support multi-language content including Chinese and English characters
author: kangarooking
securitySummary: All static findings are false positives. The subprocess.Popen calls use hardcoded arguments for legitimate clipboard utilities (xclip, xsel) with no command injection risk. Scanner misidentified YAML frontmatter and argparse configuration as weak cryptography. URLs point to legitimate X.com compose pages. Safe to publish.
valueStatement: Publishing content to X requires manual typing or risky auto-posting tools. This skill uses browser automation to prepare tweets and save them to draft, ensuring full user review before any post goes live.
userTitle: Publish Tweets and Threads to X Draft Using Browser Automation
limitations: Does not auto-publish and always saves to draft for user review
Requires user to be logged into X in the browser session
Only supports short tweets and threads with 3-10 tweets maximum
Requires Playwright MCP server to be installed and configured

useCases.targetUser: Content creators and social media managers
useCases.title: Quick Tweet Drafting
useCases.description: Prepare and save short tweets to X draft for review before posting. Ideal for timely announcements or quick thoughts that need review.

useCases.title: Multi-Tweet Thread Creation
useCases.description: Parse multi-part thread content and save each tweet to a draft thread on X. Thread numbering and formatting are preserved.

useCases.title: Multi-Language Content Drafting
useCases.description: Draft tweets in any language including Chinese, English, and other Unicode characters for review before posting.

promptTemplates.title: Simple Tweet Draft
promptTemplates.prompt: Publish this to X draft: Claude 4.5 brings extended thinking capabilities to AI coding assistants
promptTemplates.scenario: Draft a single short tweet under 280 characters

promptTemplates.title: Multi-Tweet Thread
promptTemplates.prompt:
Create an X thread from this content and save to draft:

1/3 AI is transforming how we write software
2/3 Claude Code enables natural language coding for faster development
3/3 The future of software development is here today
promptTemplates.scenario: Draft a multi-tweet thread with numbered parts

promptTemplates.title: Multi-Language Tweet
promptTemplates.prompt: Publish this to X draft: Claude 4.5发布了，extended thinking是真正的游戏规则改变者。
promptTemplates.scenario: Draft a tweet in Chinese or other languages

promptTemplates.title: Thread with Pre-Created Content
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the x-create thread content to publish to X draft
promptTemplates.scenario: Publish a thread created by another skill to X draft

bestPractices: Always review drafts at x.com/compose/drafts before posting to verify content accuracy
Use the x-create skill first to plan thread content before using x-publish to save it
Verify character counts stay under 280 characters per tweet before drafting long content
antiPatterns: Do not request auto-publish because this skill only saves to draft for user review
Do not use this skill when the user wants to post immediately without review
Do not draft content without planning for user review and approval first

faq.question: Does x-publish post tweets immediately?
faq.answer: No. This skill always saves content to draft only. Users must manually review and post from the X drafts page at x.com/compose/drafts.

faq.question: What happens if I am not logged into X?
faq.answer: The skill will detect the login page and prompt you to log in to X first before running the command again.

faq.question: Can I edit the draft after saving?
faq.answer: Yes. All drafts are saved to your X account and can be edited at x.com/compose/drafts before posting.

faq.question: What is the maximum thread length supported?
faq.answer: Threads are limited to 3-10 tweets for practical use. Longer content should be split into multiple threads.

faq.question: Does this skill work on all platforms?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill uses Playwright MCP for browser automation and supports macOS, Windows, and Linux. The clipboard script supports all three platforms.

faq.question: What dependencies are required to use this skill?
faq.answer: You need Playwright MCP server for browser automation and Python 3.9 or higher with platform-specific clipboard libraries installed.
